scenarios.title: Third-party repair damage
scenarios.description: Customer reports iPhone malfunctioning after a screen replacement performed by a non-authorized repair shop.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider (AASP).

scenarios.reasoning: Damage resulting from repairs by non-authorized providers is explicitly excluded under section 4.2(ii)(d). No service fee applies and this does not count toward the accidental damage from handling (ADH) limit.
